title: Bootstrap the TypeScript monorepo and quality gates
summary: Initialize the pnpm workspace, exact tool versions, strict TypeScript configs, formatting/linting, package boundaries, test commands and CI skeleton described by M0.
acceptance: Workspace contains agreed apps/packages with enforceable dependency direction
Typecheck, lint, unit-test and content-validation commands run from root
Tool versions are pinned and documented in an ADR
No product runtime behavior is implemented beyond a minimal smoke test

history.details: Bootstrapped pinned pnpm TypeScript monorepo skeleton, strict root gates, package boundary/content validators, CI skeleton, ADRs and WM-0002 report; owner recheck reran frozen install, typecheck, lint, format check, content validation, boundary check, tests, handoff validation, taskctl validation/status and git diff check successfully.
verified: No blocking findings; acceptance evidence confirmed for pinned monorepo bootstrap and root gates

review.summary: No blocking findings; acceptance evidence confirmed for pinned monorepo bootstrap and root gates
